title: The Indira Gandhi National Tribal University Act, 2007
full_text: The Indira Gandhi National Tribal University Act, 2007 इंदिरा गांधी राष्ट्री य जनजातीय विश्वाविद्यालयअधिनियम, 2007 Rules Regulations Notifications Orders Circulars Ordinance Statutes SectionsScheduleAnnexureAppendixFormsActdetails Act ID: 200752 Act Number: 52 Enactment Date: 2007-12-20 Act Year: 2007 Short Title: The Indira Gandhi National Tribal University Act, 2007 Hindi Title: इंदिरा गांधी राष्ट्री य जनजातीय विश्वाविद्यालयअधिनियम, 2007 Long Title: An Act to establish and incorporate a teaching and affiliating University at Amarkantak in the State of Madhya Pradesh to facilitate and promote avenues of higher education and research facilities for the tribal population in India and to provide for matters connected therewith or incidental thereto. Ministry: Ministry of Education Department: Department of Higher Education Enforcement Date: 08-07-2008 Notification: 8th July 2008, vide notification No. S.O. 1630(E), dated 7th July, 2008, see Gazette of India, Extraordinary, Part II, sec. 3(ii). Schedule 1. THE SCHEDULE Order Appendix Forms TitleFiles TitleFiles TitleFiles The Indira Gandhi National Tribal University Act, 2007 Show all section Section 1. Short title and commencement. Section 2. Definitions. Section 3. Establishment of University. Section 4. Objects of University. Section 5. Powers of University. Section 6. Jurisdiction. Section 7. University open to all classes, castes and creed. Section 8. Residence of students. Section 9. Power to establish and maintain schools. Section 10. The Visitor. Section 11. Officers of University. Section 45. Proceedings of authorities or bodies not invalidated by vacancies. Section 46. Protection of action taken in good faith. Section 47. Mode of proof of University record. Section 48.
